name: CLI Commands ‚Äî new and test
description: The two CLI commands that depend on the generator and on the reference flow format. `relay new` delegates to the generator's templates per product spec ¬ß6.9; `relay test` is the v1 stub of the eval harness (a full implementation is v1.x per tech spec ¬ß10.3).

waves.name: relay new
waves.description: Create `packages/cli/src/commands/new.ts`. Two output modes per product spec ¬ß6.9. (A) When the generator skill IS installed at `~/.claude/skills/relay-generator/`, `relay new` with NO --template flag prints the handoff block from ¬ß6.9: header `‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè  relay new`, blank line, `the relay generator skill is installed in claude code.`, blank, `open a new claude code session in this directory and say:`, indented `scaffold a new relay flow`, blank, `or, to skip the skill and start from a blank template:`, indented `relay new my-flow --template blank`. (B) When skill is NOT installed OR user passed --template, emit a static template directly: header `‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè‚îÄ‚ñ∂‚óè  relay new <name> (<template> template)`, blank, SYMBOLS.ok rows per file written (`wrote ./<name>/package.json`, etc.), `installed dev dependencies`, blank, `try it:`, indented `cd <name> && relay run .`. Resolve scaffold via require.resolve('@relay/generator/scaffold') or spawn `relay-generator scaffold`. Accept `--template blank|linear|fan-out|discovery` (default: blank). Validate name is kebab-case. Require `--force` to overwrite existing dir. Import visuals from task_77.

waves.name: relay test (v1 stub)
waves.description: Create `packages/cli/src/commands/test.ts`. v1 scope per ¬ß10.3: stub the eval harness. Accept a flow path. Actions: (1) resolve the flow via loadFlow, (2) run a smoke test: if the flow package has a `test/fixtures/*.json` with { input, expectedArtifacts }, execute the flow with a MockProvider (from @relay/core/testing) and check each expectedArtifact file exists after the run. (3) print PASS/FAIL per fixture and exit 0 / 1. If no fixtures dir, print a friendly warning and exit 0 (tests are optional in v1). Document in the output that full eval harness lands in v1.x.
